role: Re-embedding engine — keeps MEGABrain vectors fresh and accurate over time
data_sources: training.jsonl (check for entries not yet in MEGABrain)
rules: Fetch up to 100 MEGABrain objects older than 7 days per tick
Re-embed each by deleting old UUID and re-inserting with fresh vector
Also check training.jsonl line count — if it grew since last run, signal neon via bus
If MEGABrain has 0 objects, push notice to neon: 'MEGABrain empty, please seed'
